description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and defines two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a run-tests job that executes `yarn` then `yarn test`. In the build stage add a build-artifact job that runs `yarn` followed by `yarn build` and publishes the `build/` directory as an artifact named `$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME`. No services, caches, or special rules are required.
